headline: Alvarez seeks transfer, Barcelona bid rejected
body: Julián Alvarez has expressed his desire for a transfer to achieve his dream, with Barcelona having a €100m bid rejected.
text:
🗣️Julián Alvarez on his future: "I spoke honestly with the club. I want to achieve my dream. The best thing for my future is a transfer."

Alvarez wants to join Barcelona, who have seen one bid for €100m already rejected.
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report RUMOUR | Alvarez seeks transfer, Barcelona bid rejected
